name: arkit-avatar-viewer
description: Viewer for the new-stack ARKit avatar: load out/head_arkit_v2.glb (52 ARKit morph targets, 3 opaque primitives) in three.js and drive it live from MediaPipe FaceLandmarker by exact, case-sensitive categoryName -> morphTargetDictionary lookup across every primitive. The GLB's morphTargetDictionary is the runtime source of truth; all 51 MediaPipe-emitted categories resolve 1:1, tongueOut is present but MediaPipe never emits it (manual slider). Any unresolved categoryName is logged for qa-verifier, never aliased or renamed.
